metadata.description: Fabric material items - lootable cloth materials that reference property definitions
notes: These are actual inventory items that drop from enemies/chests
Each references a property definition in properties/materials/fabrics
Used in crafting system to apply fabric bonuses to armor

items.name: Burlap Cloth
items.description: Rough, coarse fabric. Common and inexpensive.

items.name: Linen Cloth
items.description: Smooth, durable fabric woven from flax fibers.

items.name: Cotton Cloth
items.description: Soft, breathable fabric suitable for everyday wear.

items.name: Wool Cloth
items.description: Warm, insulating fabric sheared from sheep.

items.name: Silk Cloth
items.description: Luxurious, lightweight fabric spun from silk threads.

items.name: Velvet Cloth
items.description: Rich, plush fabric with a soft pile.

items.name: Mageweave Cloth
items.description: Fabric infused with magical energy, enhances spellcasting.

items.name: Runecloth
items.description: Ancient cloth inscribed with mystical runes.

items.name: Shimmercloth
items.description: Ethereal fabric that seems to shift between planes.

items.name: Ethereal Silk
items.description: Otherworldly silk woven from spectral threads.

items.name: Voidweave
items.description: Dark fabric that absorbs light, woven from void essence.
